# Copilot Instructions for Mist World

This project uses AGENTS.md as the single source of truth for all AI agent guidelines.
Copilot CLI reads AGENTS.md natively — refer to it for tech stack, conventions, and rules.

## Additional GitHub-specific Guidelines
- PR descriptions must reference related Issues (e.g. `Closes #42`)
- Use conventional commit messages: `feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`, `docs:`, `test:`
- Branch naming: `feat/xxx`, `fix/xxx`, `refactor/xxx`
- Always request review before merging
